title: Single-task smoke test (cheapest scenario)
description: Deliberately the cheapest, simplest scenario in the library -- exists so `npm run battle -- --scenario single-task-smoke --model haiku` can prove the whole harness's plumbing end-to-end without spending much on the live smoke test (see docs/BATTLE-TESTING.md).
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Smoke Test" and add one task called "{{prefix}}hello world" with priority 3.
